note: golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update. Vector 1: seeded default, credits exceed debits, deposit sufficient. Vector 2: single credit line vs a small debit, deposit balance held well below the reserve requirement (deficient). Vector 3: aging-rule edge -- one FTD debit aged 45 days (excluded per Exhibit A >30-day rule) alongside one aged 20 days (included), plus PAB variant flag. Vector 4: zero-input edge (finite gate, no NaN/Infinity, all totals resolve to 0).

vectors.name: seeded_default_sufficient
vectors.description: Free credit balances + margin credit balances + securities-loaned payable as credits; a margin-account debit (1% haircut applied) and a 10-day-aged FTD debit (within the 30-day inclusion window) as debits. Reserve account balance of $35M covers the $34.2M requirement.

credit_items.label: Payable from securities loaned using customer securities
Payable from securities loaned using customer securities

output_payload.regulatory_basis: SEC Rule 15c3-3 Exhibit A customer reserve formula (17 CFR 240.15c3-3).
output_payload.note: Simplified computation over a representative subset of Exhibit A credit/debit line items with their prescribed aging and haircut treatments, from caller-supplied line items for one computation date (weekly computation framing). Does not audit the source of the supplied figures and is not a determination of regulatory compliance.

vectors.name: deficient_shortfall
vectors.description: A single $100M credit line against a $10M debit yields a $90M requirement; the firm's reserve account holds only $40M -- a $50M shortfall.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: SEC Rule 15c3-3 Exhibit A customer reserve formula (17 CFR 240.15c3-3).
output_payload.note: Simplified computation over a representative subset of Exhibit A credit/debit line items with their prescribed aging and haircut treatments, from caller-supplied line items for one computation date (weekly computation framing). Does not audit the source of the supplied figures and is not a determination of regulatory compliance.

vectors.name: aging_rule_edge_ftd_excluded
vectors.description: Two failed-to-deliver debits: one aged 45 days (excluded, past the 30-day Exhibit A cutoff) and one aged 20 days (included). PAB (proprietary account of a broker-dealer) variant flag set.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: SEC Rule 15c3-3 Exhibit A customer reserve formula (17 CFR 240.15c3-3).
output_payload.note: Simplified computation over a representative subset of Exhibit A credit/debit line items with their prescribed aging and haircut treatments, from caller-supplied line items for one computation date (weekly computation framing). Does not audit the source of the supplied figures and is not a determination of regulatory compliance.

vectors.name: zero_input_edge
vectors.description: No credit or debit items supplied at all. Finite gate: every total resolves to 0, not NaN/Infinity, and a zero requirement is vacuously sufficient.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: SEC Rule 15c3-3 Exhibit A customer reserve formula (17 CFR 240.15c3-3).
